suite.name: mini-tokenopt-natural-comparison
suite.purpose: Controlled mini suite to compare baseline/mcp/codegraph/hybrid token economics on same prompts.

rows.finalAnswer: {"project_overview":"TokenOpt is a TypeScript CLI that initializes config, installs/handles Codex/Copilot hooks, runs wrapped commands, executes benchmark suites, manages instruction packs, launches MCP, generates reports, and runs doctor checks through a single dispatcher in `src/cli.ts`, delegating work to specialized modules in `src/`.","commands":[{"name":"help","aliases":["--help","-h"]},{"name":"init"},{"name":"install","subcommands":["codex","copilot"]},{"name":"setup","subcommands":["copilot"]},{"name":"hook","subcommands":["codex","copilot"]},{"name":"exec"},{"name":"mcp"},{"name":"benchmark","subcommands":["workflow-ab","suite","codex-daily","daily","(default-to-runBenchmarkCommand)"]},{"name":"instructions","subcommands":["audit","emit","graph","prompts","install-graph","install-prompts","install"]},{"name":"report"},{"name":"doctor","subcommands":["codex-hooks","copilot","(default)"]}],"files":["src/cli.ts","src/config.ts","src/install.ts","src/copilot-setup.ts","src/codex-adapter.ts","src/copilot-adapter.ts","src/exec.ts","src/mcp.ts","src/benchmark.ts","src/codex-benchmark.ts","src/suite-benchmark.ts","src/workflow-ab-benchmark.ts","src/instruction-audit.ts","src/report.ts","src/doctor.ts","src/observability.ts"],"risks":["Manual string-based dispatch in `src/cli.ts` can silently drift from user-facing help and is prone to argument edge-case regressions when commands are renamed or expanded.","The `benchmark` branch forwards most subcommands to `runBenchmarkCommand`, so top-level validation and discoverability of supported `benchmark` forms are partially delegated and not fully explicit in the dispatcher.","`mcp` mode parsing supports `lite|full|broker` while help text only advertises `lite|full`, creating documentation/runtime contract mismatch.","Hook subcommands are hard-coded to exactly four event names, so any new hook event type requires code+docs changes together or runtime errors.","`init` checks file existence and exits success on already-existing config, which is safe but may hide configuration drift if users expect initialization to overwrite." ]}
rows.prompt: Return valid compact JSON only with keys project_overview, commands, files, risks. "project_overview": concise 1-2 line summary of this repository. "commands": top-level CLI commands from src/cli.ts. "files": files referenced by commands if inferable. "risks": implementation risks. Do not modify files.
rows.codexPrompt:
Task (do not rephrase):
Return valid compact JSON only with keys project_overview, commands, files, risks. "project_overview": concise 1-2 line summary of this repository. "commands": top-level CLI commands from src/cli.ts. "files": files referenced by commands if inferable. "risks": implementation risks. Do not modify files.

Benchmark constraints:
- Preserve the requested output format exactly.
- Cite repository-relative files when the task asks for citations.
- Do not modify files.
- Keep user-provided task wording as the primary requirement; apply any installed AGENTS/agent instructions first.
- Repository root: D:\Personal\Projects\tokenopt

- Use normal Codex CLI tools if needed. Keep exploration bounded, but gather enough evidence for a correct answer.

rows.prompt: Return valid compact JSON only with keys command_list, setup_flow, quality_focus, output_shape. Explain how benchmark, mcp, and codegraph modes are selected today and what each mode should buy as signal/cost tradeoff.

Task (do not rephrase):
Return valid compact JSON only with keys command_list, setup_flow, quality_focus, output_shape. Explain how benchmark, mcp, and codegraph modes are selected today and what each mode should buy as signal/cost tradeoff.

Benchmark constraints:
- Preserve the requested output format exactly.
- Cite repository-relative files when the task asks for citations.
- Do not modify files.
- Keep user-provided task wording as the primary requirement; apply any installed AGENTS/agent instructions first.

qualityRubric: maps tradeoff between token cost and signal

rows.finalAnswer: {"modes":[{"name":"route_task_classes","kind":"router","items":["needs_input_bypass","small_repo_bypass","review_diff","coding_coverage","debug_runtime","refactor_scope","exact_symbol","security_audit","broad_flow"],"actionValues":["compile","bypass","exact_route"],"safety":"Router emits RouteDecision with both taskClass and RouteAction, and attaches fallbackReason when route cannot proceed normally.","sources":["src/router.ts","src/types.ts"]},{"name":"playbook_modes","kind":"evidence_budgets","items":[{"name":"missing_artifact","maxTotalActions":0},{"name":"ask_or_bypass","maxTotalActions":0},{"name":"coding_coverage","maxMcpCalls":2,"maxShellCalls":0,"maxFileReads":1,"maxFollowups":1,"maxTotalActions":2},{"name":"tracebug_direct","maxMcpCalls":1,"maxShellCalls":0,"maxFileReads":1,"maxFollowups":1,"maxTotalActions":2},{"name":"failure_packet","maxShellCalls":1},{"name":"review_bounded","maxShellCalls":0,"maxFileReads":3,"maxFollowups":3},{"name":"broad_compile","maxShellCalls":0,"maxFileReads":2,"maxTotalActions":3},{"name":"security_audit","maxShellCalls":0,"maxFileReads":2}],"safety":"These mode budgets enforce bounded follow-up behavior in fallback/evidence flows.","sources":["src/playbooks.ts"]},{"name":"suite_modes","kind":"benchmark","items":[{"name":"compiled-hard-gate","shell":"disabled","fallback":"hard no-tool-after-answerable enforced in prompt/policy path"},{"name":"mcp-first","shell":"conditional","fallback":"shell fallback only after exact TokenOpt followups fail"},{"name":"router-strict","shell":"disabled","fallback":"exact followup constraints injected in mode prompt"},{"name":"router-best","shell":"disabled","fallback":"exact followup constraints injected in mode prompt"},{"name":"mcp-only","shell":"disabled","fallback":"mcp-only execution path"},{"name":"codegraph-only","shell":"disabled","fallback":"codegraph-only execution path"},{"name":"tokenopt-codegraph","shell":"disabled","fallback":"tokenopt-codegraph execution path"},{"name":"tokenopt-codegraph-natural","shell":"disabled","fallback":"tokenopt-codegraph-natural execution path"}],"safety":"Mode switches directly change which tools/fallbacks are allowed.","sources":["src/suite-benchmark.ts"]},{"name":"mcp_modes","kind":"tool_surface","items":[{"name":"lite","tools":["contextgate_get_context","tokenopt_compile_evidence","tokenopt_search","tokenopt_read_file"]},{"name":"full","tools":["contextgate_get_context","tokenopt_compile_evidence","tokenopt_search","tokenopt_read_file"],"notes":"adds privileged tools such as run_command/project_facts/impact/searching/trace"},{"name":"broker","tools":["contextgate_get_context","tokenopt_compile_evidence"]}],"safety":"Tool availability and therefore fallback reach is constrained by MCP mode.","sources":["src/mcp.ts"]}],"token_guardrails":[{"name":"policy_defaults","items":{"enabled":true,"maxFileReadBytes":96000,"maxCommandOutputChars":16000,"denyGeneratedReads":true,"denyLockfileReads":true,"broadSearch":{"mode":"deny","maxResults":80},"expensiveTests":{"mode":"rewrite","targetedHint":"configured"},"answerabilityGate":{"mode":"hard","logShadowDecisions":true}},"sources":["src/config.ts"]},{"name":"pre_tool_guardrails","items":["Secrets in prompt are denied","Injected TokenOpt instructions in prompt are denied","Broad search patterns (e.g., recursive rg/find/ls -R/grep -R broad forms) are blocked unless allowed by answerability/shadow mode","Read targets blocked when path is generated, lockfile, or too large for maxFileReadBytes","Expensive tests are rewritten when rewrite mode is set"],"sources":["src/policy-core.ts","src/shell.ts"]},{"name":"post_tool_guardrails","items":["Command output is compressed/truncated by maxCommandOutputChars","Tool output artifacts are persisted for evidence when large"],"sources":["src/policy-core.ts","src/mcp.ts"]}],"fallback_policy":[{"name":"compile_evidence_fallbacks","items":["compileEvidenceTool computes `recommended_next_action` and `max_additional_calls`","answerable packet => max_additional_calls=0","review_diff => max_additional_calls=2","coding_coverage/write_unittest => max_additional_calls=1","others default => up to 3","needs_input_bypass => 0"],"sources":["src/mcp.ts"]},{"name":"answerable_followup_gate","items":["maybeGateAfterAnswerable blocks any follow-up when answerability state active and max_additional_calls <= 0","message directs immediate answer using compiled evidence packet","hard/shadow mode controls deny/context behavior for would-be blocked calls"],"sources":["src/mcp.ts","src/evidence-state.ts","src/hard-gate.ts"]},{"name":"broad_followup_shadow_logic","items":["shadow-gate marks wouldDeny for broad exploratory calls when packet is answerable unless exact-read pattern","hard-gate turns those into deny in production mode"],"sources":["src/shadow-gate.ts","src/hard-gate.ts","test/mvp-router-shadow-compressors.test.mjs"]},{"name":"fallback_metadata","items":["Suite route metadata emits fallback_reason and acquisition_mode","doubleSpend is detected when broad/repo-wide packet acquisition is followed by direct-narrow followup"],"sources":["src/suite-benchmark.ts","src/router.ts","test/suite-benchmark-metadata.test.mjs"]}],"unknowns":[{"item":"Per-task route-to-playbook mapping completeness","reason":"Observed class/limit tables are explicit, but the full exhaustive decision matrix between every user intent and playbook is not fully surfaced in one condensed section.","sources":["src/router.ts","src/playbooks.ts"]},{"item":"Full tool allowlist for MCP full mode","reason":"Only representative/partial names are visible in the inspected excerpts, and extra tool names may exist.","sources":["src/mcp.ts"]},{"item":"Exact per-mode safety in adaptive/edge branches","reason":"Suite mode logic contains conditional paths; not all branches are enumerated in the captured excerpt.","sources":["src/suite-benchmark.ts"]}]}
